INTERPRETATION
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The symmetric and antisymmetric seeds test whether the signed
cruller twist naturally decomposes the dynamics into parity sectors.
A clean sector separation suggests an internal binary mode structure.
The localized seed shows how a generic pulse mixes those sectors.
